title: Forms and Comments
excerpt: So I have a form that is submitted but the long description field is not easily read in the table format. Is there a way that I can use an automation or app to copy what is in the description and convert it to comment?

posts.author: danielger (Daniel Gering)
posts.cookedHtml: So I have a form that is submitted but the long description field is not easily read in the table format. Is there a way that I can use an automation or app to copy what is in the description and convert it to comment?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Daniel,

By comment, are you referring to the updates section? For example, casting/copying the data in long text column to the updates section? Thanks!

posts.author: danielger (Daniel Gering)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes Bianca. Coping the text to the updates section. My thought was since I am populating the column using a form, and since it does not appear that the form can directly create an update, I thought maybe there was an automation that could do that instead.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for confirming Daniel!

How about this automation?

Screen Shot 2024-04-12 at 11.24.12 am1546×1008 53.7 KB

This will allow you to populate the updates with the content in the long text, as soon as that form is submitted! I’ve tested this on my end and it worked well.

What do you think?
